steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We're given that 1 fathom = 6 feet, and the camera is at a depth of 58 fathoms. To find the depth in feet, we multiply the fathom measurement by the conversion factor that relates fathoms to feet.

steps.title: Convert to feet
steps.content:
Multiply the depth in fathoms by the conversion factor:
$$58 \times 6 = 348 \text{ feet}$$
The camera's depth is 348 feet.
